center.name: Mongolian Ornithological Society
center.summary: Mongolian Ornithological Society是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白額隼，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: fringillarius in Kalimantan, Indonesia|url=https://www.researchgate.net/publication/236856304|journal=Forktail|volume=28|pages=162–163}} It inhabits open forests, forest edges, clearings with dead trees, and cultivated regions with interspersed trees, and is thought to be especially common on mountainous slopes.
